message:
test(core): expand anomaly scanner test coverage to 61%

Add 30 comprehensive tests for the anomaly scanner module covering:
- Edge cases: empty sequences, zero window/step size, exact-size sequences
- Case handling: lowercase, RNA (U→T), N characters, special chars
- Dense vs sparse k-mer paths (k<=10 vs k>10)
- Result structure validation (windows, globalKmerFreq, thresholds)
- Anomaly classification (Repetitive, HGT, Unknown types)
- Window parameters (size, step, position correctness)
- Threshold calculation (95th percentile based)
- Compression ratio behavior (repetitive vs varied sequences)
- K-mer parameter variations (k=1 through k=8)

Coverage improves from 43.26% to 61.31% line coverage.

Also fixes pre-existing lint errors in:
- codons.test.ts: TypeScript type mismatch in amino acid test
- crispr.test.ts: Remove unused SEQ_WITH_PAM constant

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
